generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control Engineers define configurations and control logic for smart lighting controllers within BIM, enabling bidirectional synchronization with physical lighting systems via TwinLight framework"
]

instance HVACSystemController : DTDFVocab:ActuatingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC system controllers configured in BIM for energy management and environmental control, interfacing with physical HVAC units via middleware protocols"
]

instance OccupancyActuator : DTDFVocab:ActuatingComponent [
    base:desc "Smart occupancy sensors and actuators that respond to real-time occupancy data for automated lighting/HVAC adjustments"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensors integrated in BIM models for environmental monitoring, extracting post-occupancy data via Eclipse Hono middleware"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataStream
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensors modeled in BIM to monitor indoor air quality, feeding real-time data to the Digital Twin via Ditto protocol"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataStream
]

instance LightIntensitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Smart lighting sensors capturing real-time light levels in BIM-enriched zones for adaptive control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightIntensityDataStream
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy detection sensors modeled in BIM for space utilization monitoring, transmitting presence data via Hono"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataStream
]

instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Energy usage sensors tracking HVAC/lighting power consumption in BIM zones, feeding real-time metrics to DT"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataStream
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance TemperatureDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
    DTDFVocab:protocol EclipseHono
    DTDFVocab:frequency RealTime
]

instance HumidityDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
    DTDFVocab:protocol Ditto
    DTDFVocab:frequency RealTime
]

instance LightIntensityDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightIntensitySensor
    DTDFVocab:protocol Hono
    DTDFVocab:frequency Continuous
]

instance OccupancyDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
    DTDFVocab:protocol EclipseHono
    DTDFVocab:frequency EventBased
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionSensor
    DTDFVocab:protocol Ditto
    DTDFVocab:frequency RealTime
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMEnrichedModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM model enriched with device configurations, control logic, and spatial relationships for Digital Twin integration"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AutodeskRevitTool
]

instance RuntimeMetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model containing extracted runtime metadata (sensor/actuator endpoints) generated during deployment phase"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoMiddleware
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model defining control algorithms and automation rules implemented by Building Control Engineers in BIM"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringFramework
]

instance VisualizationDataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D rendering data for immersive visualization in Unreal Engine, derived from BIM geometry and sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed temperature readings from physical sensors, stored for real-time monitoring and predictive analytics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningOptimizer
]

instance HumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed humidity measurements from environmental sensors, used for indoor air quality analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HumidityDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HVACOptimizationService
]

instance LightIntensityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed light level measurements enabling adaptive lighting control based on occupancy and ambient conditions"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightIntensityDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TwinLightControlFramework
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed occupancy metrics for space utilization analysis and automated system adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngineImmersiveVisualization
]

instance EnergyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed energy consumption metrics from building systems for predictive maintenance and efficiency optimization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyConsumptionDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BOREALISReinforcementLearning
]

// C11: Enablers
instance AutodeskRevitTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Revit used for BIM modeling of building components, device configurations, and control logic"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMEnrichedModel
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering framework automating transformations from BIM to runtime artifacts (model-to-model/model-to-text)"
    DTDFVocab:enables RuntimeMetadataModel, ControlLogicModel
]

instance EclipseHonoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware facilitating real-time bidirectional communication between physical building systems and Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperatureDataStream, OccupancyDataStream
]

instance DittoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ditto protocol implementation for real-time data exchange between sensors/actuators and Digital Twin runtime"
    DTDFVocab:enables HumidityDataStream, EnergyConsumptionDataStream
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 platform providing immersive 3D visualization for real-time building condition monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationDataModel
]

instance StandardizedExtensionPoints : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Standardized interfaces allowing DT Engineers to deploy custom domain-specific plugins and services"
    DTDFVocab:enables CustomServiceIntegration
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service providing live visualization of building conditions through immersive 3D interfaces"
    DTDFVocab:provides ImmersiveVisualizationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service using reinforcement learning to generate data-driven recommendations for energy efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationRecommendation, LightingAdjustmentRecommendation
]

instance AdaptiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adaptive control service implementing TwinLight framework for bidirectional synchronization between BIM models and physical systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides AutomatedLightingControl, HVACSystemControl
]

instance CustomServiceIntegration : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service framework enabling deployment of domain-specific plugins via standardized extension points"
    DTDFVocab:provides DomainSpecificAnalyticsPlugin, CustomControlPlugin
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance ImmersiveVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of building conditions enabling Facility Managers to interact with environmental parameters"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven recommendations for energy efficiency improvements based on predictive analytics"
]

instance LightingAdjustmentRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized lighting adjustments suggested by reinforcement learning models for space utilization"
]

instance AutomatedLightingControl : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated control of lighting systems based on occupancy and environmental conditions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HVACSystemControl : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated control of HVAC systems for temperature and humidity regulation via reinforcement learning"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DomainSpecificAnalyticsPlugin : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Custom analytics plugin deployed via extension points for specialized building performance analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance CustomControlPlugin : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Domain-specific control plugin enabling specialized control logic integration"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C12: Environment
instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains LightingController, HVACSystemController, TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor
]

instance OccupancyZoneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains OccupancyActuator, LightIntensitySensor, EnergyConsumptionSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Virtual-to-physical interaction is facilitated by **control commands and optimization outputs** generated by DT services, which are sent back to physical actuators via Eclipse Hono. The framework automates the generation of runtime interfaces from BIM models to enable seamless bidirectional communication, ensuring that DT-driven decisions (e.g., lighting adjustments, energy optimization) are executed in real-time on the physical building infrastructure."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates in **real-time**, ensuring continuous synchronization between physical and virtual representations. The time-scale for data exchange and DT-to-physical synchronization is not specified beyond 'real-time,' but the framework supports sub-second to minute-to-hour intervals for operational monitoring and control tasks, as implied by the need for live data processing and adaptive control."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **modular, service-oriented ecosystem** where:
  - **BIM serves as the semantic backbone**, unifying static and dynamic data across lifecycle stages.
  - **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** handle real-time data synchronization between physical sensors/actuators and DT services.
  - **Unreal Engine** provides a centralized visualization layer for monitoring and control.
  - **Standardized extension points** enable the integration of multiple DT services (e.g., lighting optimization, energy analytics) in a scalable, interoperable manner."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans **all lifecycle stages** of the building:
  - **Design phase**: Enriched BIM models incorporate static and dynamic BCS components.
  - **Construction phase**: Device configurations and sensor placements are validated and deployed.
  - **Operational phase**: Real-time monitoring, control, and optimization occur via bidirectional data exchange with physical assets. The DT evolves through iterative updates (e.g., reinforcement learning in BOREALIS) to adapt to changing operational requirements."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Semantic Alignment**: BIM models are enriched with runtime metadata (e.g., sensor configurations) to minimize semantic drift between physical and virtual representations.
  - **Real-Time Synchronization**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto ensure low-latency data exchange, reducing discrepancies between the DT and physical assets.
  - **Validation Metrics**: The ODTE metric quantifies the DT’s entanglement with the physical system, assessing interoperability and architectural robustness.
  - **Iterative Refinement**: BOREALIS uses post-occupancy sensor data to iteratively improve control policies, enhancing DT validity over time."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connections are established via:
  1. **Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware**: Enables real-time data exchange using standardized protocols for bidirectional communication between physical sensors/actuators and the Digital Twin.
  2. **Runtime interfaces**: Automatically generated from BIM models to facilitate seamless integration with physical Building Control Systems (BCS). The system does not specify proprietary protocols like MQTT or WebSocket, but relies on middleware capabilities for connectivity."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin is deployed as a **modular, service-oriented platform** with standardized extension points, enabling scalable deployment. The framework supports distributed architectures but does not explicitly mention cloud/edge deployment. The system emphasizes maintainability through automated generation of runtime artifacts and low-overhead updates."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The framework supports **horizontal integration** through standardized extension points for modular service-oriented DT platforms. While the text emphasizes internal (vertical) integration of services (e.g., lighting, HVAC), the modular architecture enables seamless integration with external information systems via scalable, interoperable middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) and BIM-based semantic frameworks. This facilitates cross-system data exchange beyond the DT’s immediate ecosystem."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin adheres to:
  1. **AECO-specific standards**: Building Information Modeling (BIM) as the semantic backbone for unified representation and interoperability.
  2. **Standardized integration frameworks**: Ensures compatibility with existing AECO workflows and tools, though specific standards like IFC are not explicitly mentioned."
]
